message:
Update TUI module comment to reflect functional search implementation

Changed the module docstring from "placeholder wired to basic search" to
"wired to Tantivy search (basic)" to accurately reflect the current state.

Context:
- The TUI was initially scaffolded with stub search integration
- The SearchClient implementation has now been completed (previous commit)
- The TUI can now perform real full-text searches against Tantivy index
- Results are scored, filtered, and extracted from actual indexed data

The "(basic)" qualifier remains appropriate because:
- Result rendering is still placeholder (static list item)
- No result selection or navigation yet
- No snippet highlighting
- No debounced search execution (would search on every keystroke)
- No error handling/display for malformed queries
- No loading indicators during search

Future iterations will enhance the TUI with:
- Debounced search trigger (300ms after last keystroke)
- Rendered SearchHit list with title, snippet, score
- Arrow key navigation for result selection
- Enter to open/preview selected conversation
- Status line showing result count and search time
- Error display for invalid queries or index issues

This documentation update ensures the module comment accurately describes
the current functionality without overstating what's implemented.
